title: Peruvian Lamb Seco De Cordero
description: A traditional Peruvian dish featuring tender lamb, streaky bacon, and a blend of Mediterranean spices, slow cooked in a hot pot vessel to create a sour and crumbly texture, perfect for a lazy Sunday
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the hot pot vessel over medium heat
Add the diced bacon and cook until crispy, then set aside
Add the lamb pieces to the pot and brown on all sides, about 5 minutes
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute
Add the sliced aji amarillo peppers and cook for 2 minutes
Add the tomato paste, red wine vinegar, and crispy bacon back to the pot, stirring to combine
Cover the pot and simmer for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot
